scripts.build: bun run typecheck && bun run bundle
scripts.check: bun run format:check && bun run lint && bun run typecheck && bun run test
scripts.test:live: WALLETERM_LIVE=1 bun x vitest run --coverage=false tests/live/wallet-live.test.ts
scripts.test:live:op: WALLETERM_LIVE=1 WALLETERM_LIVE_OP=1 bun x vitest run --coverage=false tests/live/op-live.test.ts
scripts.test:live:keychain: WALLETERM_LIVE=1 WALLETERM_LIVE_KEYCHAIN=1 bun x vitest run --coverage=false tests/live/keychain-live.test.ts
scripts.test:live:ssh-agent: WALLETERM_LIVE=1 WALLETERM_LIVE_SSH_AGENT=1 bun x vitest run --coverage=false tests/live/ssh-agent-live.test.ts
scripts.test:live:ssh-agent:1p: WALLETERM_LIVE=1 WALLETERM_LIVE_SSH_AGENT=1 WALLETERM_LIVE_SSH_AGENT_1P=1 bun x vitest run --coverage=false tests/live/ssh-agent-live.test.ts
scripts.test:live:ssh-agent:system: WALLETERM_LIVE=1 WALLETERM_LIVE_SSH_AGENT=1 WALLETERM_LIVE_SSH_AGENT_SYSTEM=1 bun x vitest run --coverage=false tests/live/ssh-agent-live.test.ts
scripts.test:live:x402: WALLETERM_LIVE=1 WALLETERM_LIVE_X402=1 bun x vitest run --coverage=false tests/live/x402-live.test.ts
scripts.test:live:x402:op: WALLETERM_LIVE=1 WALLETERM_LIVE_X402=1 WALLETERM_LIVE_OP=1 bun x vitest run --coverage=false tests/live/x402-credential-backends-live.test.ts
scripts.test:live:x402:keychain: WALLETERM_LIVE=1 WALLETERM_LIVE_X402=1 WALLETERM_LIVE_KEYCHAIN=1 bun x vitest run --coverage=false tests/live/x402-credential-backends-live.test.ts
scripts.test:live:x402:ssh-agent:system: WALLETERM_LIVE=1 WALLETERM_LIVE_X402=1 WALLETERM_LIVE_SSH_AGENT=1 WALLETERM_LIVE_SSH_AGENT_SYSTEM=1 bun x vitest run --coverage=false tests/live/x402-credential-backends-live.test.ts
scripts.test:live:x402:ssh-agent:1p: WALLETERM_LIVE=1 WALLETERM_LIVE_X402=1 WALLETERM_LIVE_SSH_AGENT=1 WALLETERM_LIVE_SSH_AGENT_1P=1 bun x vitest run --coverage=false tests/live/x402-credential-backends-live.test.ts
scripts.test:live:all: WALLETERM_LIVE=1 WALLETERM_LIVE_OP=1 WALLETERM_LIVE_KEYCHAIN=1 WALLETERM_LIVE_SSH_AGENT=1 WALLETERM_LIVE_SSH_AGENT_1P=1 WALLETERM_LIVE_SSH_AGENT_SYSTEM=1 WALLETERM_LIVE_MPP=1 WALLETERM_LIVE_X402=1 bun x vitest run --coverage=false
